ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team competes in */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistics belong to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game during which the statistics were recorded */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts by the player */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the player */,
  "longest_gain" INTEGER /* Longest gain by the player */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns scored by the player */,
  "pass_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of pass attempts by the player */,
  "pass_completions" INTEGER /* Number of pass completions by the player */,
  "pass_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards by the player */,
  "pass_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of passing touchdowns by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown by the player */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions by the player */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards by the player */,
  "receiving_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of receiving touchdowns by the player */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles by the player */,
  "fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles lost by the player */,
  "sacks_taken" INTEGER /* Number of sacks taken by the player */,
  "sack_yards_lost" INTEGER /* Total yards lost by the player due to sacks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game for the team (win/loss) */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network broadcasting the game */,
  "game_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "can_edit_players" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can edit player data */,
  "can_edit_teams" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can edit team data */,
  "can_edit_games" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can edit game data */,
  "can_edit_game_statistics" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can edit game statistics */,
  "can_edit_users" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can edit user data */,
  "can_edit_user_roles" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can edit user roles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
